Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-11-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PHILLIP KIM's Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment.

Grant. No opposition filed.

Counsel for defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
